name: Audio Pipeline Optimization
description: Realtime audio pipeline audit: latency budgeting, buffer management, cross-platform verification.

phases.name: Pipeline Audit

delegates.task_template: Audit the realtime audio pipeline: latency budgets, buffer management, sample rate handling, and platform abstraction for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Audio pipeline audit complete with latency profile

phases.name: Optimization

delegates.task_template: Optimize hot paths in audio processing pipeline: ${goal}
Verify cross-platform audio device support (Linux/macOS/Windows) for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Latency targets met on all platforms

phases.name: Verification

delegates.task_template: End-to-end audio pipeline testing with real hardware: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Audio pipeline verified with measured latency profiles
